description: employee_id should be unique across the dataset
employee_id must match GT-000001 or AC-000001 format
email must be in a valid format
company_origin must be GlobalTech or AcquiredCo
employment_type must be Full-Time, Part-Time, or Contractor
hire_date must be between 1990-01-01 and today
salary_usd_annual must be between 20,000 and 2,000,000 when present
manager_id must refer to an employee_id in the golden dataset when present
